properties.comment: English language file for tjhcreateiconpdf https://github.com/nlct/texjavahelp GPL-3.0 Nicola Talbot
properties.entry: {0} (or {1}) <file>... Source image files or directory containing image files.

{0} (or {1}) <size> Image size which may be a single integer (width and height) or in the form <width>x<height>. The image file names should be in the form <base>-<size>.<ext> where the file extension may be png, jpeg or jpg.
{0} (or {1}) Keep a copy the document source from which the pdf is created.
